purpose: SolarPro Global — beta-testing invitee list (UK MCS-certified solar installers + suppliers)
schema_notes: Same shape as the other per-country files. Each entry has a verified email collected from the company's own contact page on 2026-06-10. MCS certification noted in `notes` field where confirmed.
